title: Late-interaction reranking — ColBERTv2 & when to skip cross-encoders | reranker.uk
description: Guide to late-interaction rerankers (ColBERTv2): how they differ from cross-encoders and bi-encoders, when to skip reranking, and how to combine architectures in 2026 stacks.
og_description: ColBERTv2 vs cross-encoder rerankers: when late-interaction is enough and when you still need stage-2 reranking.
